2025-26 Sacramento Kings Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 22-60, Finished 14th in NBA Western Conference

Coach: Doug Christie (22-60)

Executive: Scott Perry

PTS/G: 111.0 (28th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 121.0 (27th of 30)

SRS: -9.58 (28th of 30) Pace: 99.2 (18th of 30)

Off Rtg: 111.4 (26th of 30) Def Rtg: 121.5 (28th of 30) Net Rtg: -10.0 (28th of 30)

Expected W-L: 19-63 (28th of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000, Over-Under 35.5

Arena: Golden 1 Center Attendance: 661,735 (28th of 30)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

Russell Westbrook 6 (5th)
